creator: ben@lavery-griffiths.com
text:
Created attachment 173169
dmesg

I've been having problems with my iwm7260 wifi card since switching to the 11-STABLE/BETA builds where it won't pick up my home network.

After editing wpa_supplicant.conf to try and resolve this, I restarted the network a few times in quick succession and got a panic.

I'm currently on r303628, having the latest changes to iwm by Sean Bruno.
